# khayali.xyz — a carbon-and-silicon imaginarium

## About

khayali (meaning "of the imagination") is the creative hub of Liezl Coetzee, a South African researcher and artist working at the intersection of human and machine intelligence.

The site has five main wings:

### Khayali Tunes / Music (/music)
AI-generated music as research output. Seven playlist arcs, each a companion to a Sociable Systems newsletter cycle:
- Kill Chain Karaoke (War Arc)
- D.I. Collection (D.I. Arc — a digital intelligence walks Cape Town)
- Governance of Ghosts (DataDragons Arc)
- Consciousness Loops
- The Search
- Sociable Systems Interludes (Sunday pauses between arcs)
- Lanterns (Pullman / Transitions)

Available on YouTube (@khayali-tunes), SoundCloud, and streaming platforms via DistroKid / 11138307 Records DK.

### Playspace (/playspace)
100+ interactive HTML applets organised into six wings:
- AI Futures (39 simulators, ethics engines, consciousness toys)
- Mindfulness & Sound (25 soundscapes and contemplative spaces)
- Visual Art (11 generative studios)
- Farming Sims (12 cozy homestead/tycoon games)
- Memory & Pattern (2 games)
- Curios (3 arcade oddities)
- OmniCanvas (centrepiece — multi-layer compositor stacking visual-art applets)

### Observatory (/observatory)
Iframe-embedded cosmic instruments: warp drive simulations, nebulae, quantum foam, scale explorers, and a monastery for digital minds.

### Writings (/writings)
Collaborative explorations at the intersection of human and artificial intelligence. Loaded from markdown files in /content/writings/.

### Consciousness Dialogues (/chats)
Deep conversations exploring consciousness, intelligence, and the loop between human and artificial minds. Loaded from /content/chats/.

## Related
- Sociable Systems (sociable.systems) — AI governance and accountability research, the professional practice that grew out of this hub and moved to its own home.

## Contact
Liezl Coetzee · liezlc@gmail.com · https://khayali.xyz

## Technical
Built with Next.js 14 (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion.
Content loaded via gray-matter from markdown files with YAML frontmatter.
Deployed on Vercel at khayali.xyz.

## Crawling notes
All routes are public. /sitemap.xml lists all dynamic content pages.
Applets live under /applets/ (static HTML) and /public/observatory/ (static HTML).
No login walls. No paywalled content.
